title: Senior Director of Information Technology
raw_jd:
The Brattle Group, a privately held, global economic consulting firm, is looking for a Senior Director of Information Technology to join our Boston, New York City, Washington, D.C. or Chicago office.


The Brattle Group is looking for an experienced Senior Director of Information Technology to lead our global Information Technology (IT) function. Reporting to the Vice President of Operations and serving as a member of the firm’s leadership team, the Senior Director of IT will set and execute a forward-looking technology strategy that enables Brattle’s growth, strengthens operational excellence, and enhances the experience of our staff and the services we deliver to clients.


The Senior Director of IT will align technology investments with business priorities, help drive the firm’s digital transformation, and ensure a secure, scalable, and resilient technology environment. This role requires a leader who can balance innovation with risk management, translate business needs into technology solutions, and position IT as a proactive partner to the firm.


Some of the day-to-day responsibilities of this role include:

    Develop and lead the firm’s global technology strategy, ensuring technology investments and capabilities support the firm’s long-term business strategy and growth objectives.
    Identify and champion technology-enabled opportunities that enhance efficiency, innovation, and scalability.
    Stay ahead of emerging technology trends, evaluating their potential impact on the firm’s operations.
    In close partnership with other firm leaders, guide digital transformation initiatives by leveraging cloud computing, AI/ML technologies, and other emerging innovations to enhance efficiency, scalability and client service delivery.
    Provide oversight of the design, delivery and continuous optimization of a secure, reliable, and scalable global IT infrastructure through senior IT leaders.
    Guide the evolution of enterprise systems and business applications to improve operational efficiency and enable data-driven decision-making.
    Develop and execute a comprehensive cybersecurity strategy to safeguard the firm’s data, systems, and client information in a rapidly evolving threat landscape.
    Ensure compliance with evolving regulatory standards, including GDPR, NIST 800-171, SOC 2, and ISO27001.
    Establish and maintain IT governance frameworks to align with business objectives and regulatory standards.
    Lead regular risk assessments, including threat monitoring, incident response, and ongoing control enhancement processes.
    Ensure disaster recovery and business continuity plans are well designed, tested, and continuously improved.
    Advance enterprise data, analytics, and reporting frameworks to provide actionable insights and support strategic decision-making.
    Inspire and mentor a high-performing IT leadership team, delegating operational ownership while maintaining strategic direction, governance, and performance accountability.
    Serve as a trusted advisor to firm leadership, providing guidance on technology investments, emerging trends and risks.
    Foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement across IT and the broader firm.
    Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support business initiatives and client needs, ensuring technology solutions align with broader organizational goals.


THE CANDIDATE

    Bachelor’s degree required in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field preferred. Master’s degree or relevant Information Technology certifications are a strong plus.
    Minimum of 12 years’ experience, including 5+ years leading an IT function in a fast-paced, global professional services firm or similar environment.
    Minimum of 10 years in a leadership role with demonstrated ability to develop and retain people.
    Proven success in implementing IT solutions, including ERP and CRM systems.
    Strategic leadership experience in artificial intelligence and emerging technologies, with the ability to help define and execute an enterprise AI strategy aligned with business objectives and digital transformation priorities.
    Considerable track record leading cybersecurity initiatives and ensuring data integrity.
    Expertise with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure), cybersecurity frameworks and enterprise architecture.
    Prior success building and scaling IT functions.
    Proven success in a highly collaborative and consensus-driven organization.
    Outstanding verbal and written communication skills with the ability to influence stakeholders across all levels of the organization.
    Excellent strategic thinking and problem-solving abilities.
    High-level understanding of Microsoft-based environments, including Windows Server, Active Directory, Microsoft 365, Microsoft SQL Server and Microsoft SharePoint
    Exercises appropriate judgment, discretion, and confidentiality.
    Willingness to be a hands-on leader.
    Learns quickly and adapts to a growing and changing environment.
    Travel, and off-hour work, are required on an as-needed basis.


Brattle offers a competitive benefits package, base salary, and bonus program for eligible roles based on individual and firm performance. The anticipated base gross salary range for this position in Washington, D.C. is $250,000 - $275,000 annually. Actual salary will depend on a variety of factors, including experience and training.


This position is not eligible for immigration sponsorship.



EQUAL OPPORTUNITY

The Brattle Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, citizenship status, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender identity and expression, age, height, weight, domestic partner status, Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome or HIV status (AIDS/HIV status), genetic information, sexual orientation, disability (where the applicant or employee is qualified to perform the essential functions of the job with or without reasonable accommodation), marital status, veteran status, political affiliation, drug or alcohol abuse or alcoholism, or any other characteristic protected under applicable law.


We encourage all applicants to click here to review our full Equal Employer Opportunity Statement.

score.skills_rationale: Strong alignment with candidate's architecture, infrastructure, and leadership background. The role emphasizes cloud platforms, data/analytics, cybersecurity, and enterprise systems - all areas where candidate has deep experience. AI/ML strategy requirement aligns well with candidate's emerging focus on LLM/AI work.
score.scope_rationale: Perfect scope match - this is a senior executive IT leadership role requiring 12+ years experience and 5+ years leading IT functions. Candidate's progression from IC to manager to architect, plus current role leading analytics for large federal program, demonstrates the strategic leadership and cross-functional collaboration required.
score.pay_rationale: Salary range of $250K-$275K is above candidate's stated W2 target of $160K-$220K, indicating strong compensation alignment and room for negotiation.
score.raw_analysis: This is an excellent match for a senior IT executive role. The position requires strategic technology leadership, enterprise architecture, and cross-functional collaboration - all core strengths in the candidate's background. The scope and seniority align perfectly with the candidate's career trajectory and current capabilities. Salary is competitive and above target range, though location requirements may present challenges.

cover_letters.content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

As a hands-on technology leader with 25+ years of experience designing enterprise systems and leading cross-functional teams, I am well-positioned to serve as The Brattle Group's Senior Director of Information Technology. My current role architecting data platforms for the Department of Veterans Affairs' $2.6B ERP modernization, combined with my track record of stabilizing complex technology initiatives during periods of organizational change, directly aligns with your need for strategic IT leadership in a fast-paced professional services environment.

Your requirement for proven experience implementing ERP and enterprise systems matches my core expertise. At Howard University, I served as one of three cross-functional leaders driving a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation through executive disruption, helping stabilize delivery and guide the program to successful deployment. Currently, I'm leading data architecture for the VA's enterprise financial system rollout, designing integration pipelines that connect legacy systems with modern ERP platforms while ensuring audit-ready data quality. This hands-on experience with large-scale system transformations, coupled with my background in cybersecurity (CISSP certification) and cloud platforms, positions me to advance Brattle's digital transformation initiatives effectively.

My leadership approach combines strategic vision with operational execution—exactly what this role demands. I've built enterprise BI architectures, led data governance initiatives, and mentored technical teams while serving as a trusted advisor to C-level executives. My experience spanning federal agencies, universities, and consulting environments has taught me to translate complex technical concepts for diverse stakeholders and drive consensus in collaborative organizations. Additionally, my emerging focus on AI/LLM platforms, including designing secure on-premises RAG systems, aligns with your emphasis on AI/ML strategy and emerging technology evaluation.

I'm excited about the opportunity to lead Brattle's global IT function and would welcome the chance to discuss how my proven track record of delivering enterprise technology solutions can support your firm's growth and operational excellence objectives.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

As a strategic technology leader with over two decades of experience stabilizing and scaling IT functions in complex, mission-critical environments, I'm drawn to The Brattle Group's opportunity to lead global IT strategy for a premier economic consulting firm. Your need for someone who can balance innovation with risk management while positioning IT as a proactive business partner aligns perfectly with my track record of bridging technology capabilities with organizational objectives across demanding federal and enterprise environments.

Currently serving as Senior Data & Analytics Architect for the Department of Veterans Affairs' Financial Management Business Transformation, I'm leading data architecture and enterprise reporting for a large-scale ERP modernization—experience directly relevant to your enterprise systems evolution needs. At Howard University, I played a pivotal leadership role in a multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation during significant executive disruption, helping stabilize delivery and drive the program to successful deployment while establishing data governance frameworks that improved audit readiness. This hands-on experience with ERP implementations, combined with my background designing secure, scalable data platforms and leading cross-functional teams through complex system transitions, positions me well to execute your digital transformation initiatives and guide enterprise system evolution.

My expertise spans the core areas critical to your IT strategy: I've designed containerized data platforms with comprehensive security controls, built enterprise BI architectures supporting executive decision-making, and led teams through high-pressure delivery environments requiring consensus-building across finance, HR, and IT stakeholders. With certifications including CISSP and deep experience in Azure cloud services, data pipelines, and emerging AI technologies—including recent work with LLM/RAG platforms—I can help The Brattle Group leverage cloud computing and AI/ML innovations while maintaining the rigorous security and compliance standards your consulting work demands.

I'm excited about the opportunity to bring my collaborative leadership style and proven ability to translate complex technical challenges into business solutions to The Brattle Group's dynamic environment. I look forward to discussing how my experience scaling IT functions and driving technology-enabled growth can contribute to your firm's continued success.

Sincerely,
Salil Maniktahla

Dear Hiring Manager,

I'm writing to express my interest in the Senior Director of Information Technology role at The Brattle Group. With 25+ years leading data and technology initiatives across complex organizations, I bring the strategic vision and hands-on execution experience needed to drive your firm's digital transformation. Currently serving as Senior Data & Analytics Architect for the VA's $2B+ ERP modernization, I've designed enterprise data architectures, led cross-functional teams through major system implementations, and delivered mission-critical infrastructure supporting thousands of users. My recent work at Howard University, where I co-led a multi-million-dollar Workday implementation during executive disruption, demonstrates my ability to stabilize complex programs and drive successful outcomes in high-stakes environments.

Your emphasis on AI/ML strategy particularly resonates with my current focus—I've designed secure on-premise LLM/RAG platforms and am actively exploring enterprise AI applications. My background spans the full spectrum of your requirements: enterprise architecture, cybersecurity leadership (CISSP-certified), cloud platforms, and ERP/CRM implementations across both private sector and federal environments. I excel at translating business needs into technology solutions while building collaborative relationships with stakeholders at all levels. I'm ready to help The Brattle Group leverage emerging technologies to enhance operational excellence and client service delivery.

Best regards,
Salil Maniktahla

tailored_resume:
SALIL MANIKTAHLA
Springfield, VA  ·  571-215-8218  ·  salil.maniktahla@gmail.com  ·  linkedin.com/in/salilmaniktahla

SUMMARY
Strategic IT leader with 25+ years of experience driving technology transformation and enterprise architecture across global organizations. Currently leading data architecture and infrastructure for the Department of Veterans Affairs' Financial Management Business Transformation program, delivering large-scale ERP modernization and enterprise reporting systems. Proven track record developing and executing technology strategies that align with business objectives, leading digital transformation initiatives, and building high-performing IT teams.

Known for translating complex business needs into scalable technology solutions, implementing robust cybersecurity frameworks, and serving as trusted advisor to executive leadership. Experienced in fast-paced, collaborative environments requiring consensus-driven decision making and cross-functional partnership to drive operational excellence and innovation.

CORE CAPABILITIES
Strategic Technology Leadership
    • Enterprise technology strategy development and execution aligned with business objectives
    • Digital transformation leadership leveraging cloud computing, AI/ML, and emerging technologies
    • IT governance frameworks, risk management, and regulatory compliance initiatives

Enterprise Architecture & Infrastructure
    • Global IT infrastructure design, delivery, and optimization for scalable, secure environments
    • ERP system implementation and enterprise application evolution (Workday, iFAMS, legacy systems)
    • Cloud platforms (Azure), distributed systems, and containerized environments

Cybersecurity & Risk Management
    • Comprehensive cybersecurity strategy development and implementation
    • Data integrity frameworks, threat monitoring, and incident response processes
    • Disaster recovery and business continuity planning

Data & Analytics Strategy
    • Enterprise data architecture, analytics frameworks, and reporting systems
    • Data-driven decision making platforms and actionable business intelligence
    • Data governance policies and validation processes for operational efficiency

Team Leadership & Collaboration
    • IT function leadership, team development, and performance accountability
    • Cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder influence across all organizational levels
    • Mentoring high-performing technical teams through growth and transformation

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Data & Analytics Architect (Contractor)
U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs – FMBT	Sep 2021 – Present
    • Lead enterprise technology strategy and architecture supporting rollout of VA's multi-billion dollar ERP modernization program (iFAMS)
    • Serve as trusted technology advisor to executive leadership, providing strategic guidance on system integration, data architecture, and digital transformation initiatives
    • Drive implementation of secure, scalable enterprise data infrastructure integrating legacy financial systems with modern ERP platforms
    • Establish comprehensive data governance frameworks, validation processes, and audit-ready architectures ensuring regulatory compliance and data integrity
    • Design and deliver executive reporting systems and business intelligence platforms supporting strategic decision-making across finance and operations
    • Lead cross-functional collaboration with finance, acquisition, and IT stakeholders to resolve complex system challenges and meet critical delivery timelines
    • Provide hands-on technical leadership in performance optimization, system reliability, and enterprise architecture evolution

Business Intelligence Analyst – Finance
Howard University	Apr 2020 – Jul 2024
    • Played key strategic leadership role in multi-million-dollar Workday ERP implementation as one of three cross-functional drivers during period of executive transition
    • Led enterprise data governance initiative, defining policies and frameworks that improved data quality and operational efficiency across financial systems
    • Designed and implemented comprehensive BI data architecture and enterprise data warehouse supporting data-driven decision making
    • Served as Workday Analytics Lead in direct collaboration with Deputy CFO, translating business requirements into technology solutions
    • Established KPI frameworks and executive reporting systems enabling strategic business insights and performance monitoring
    • Helped stabilize technology delivery and resolve critical system issues during organizational change, ensuring successful program completion

BI Partner / Strategist (Independent Consultant)
Multiple Clients	Jul 2016 – Mar 2020
    • Delivered enterprise data platforms, analytics solutions, and technology strategy across multiple clients in professional services and other industries
    • Led implementation of BI solutions aligned with governance frameworks and compliance requirements
    • Mentored IT teams and technical leaders, supporting organizational development and capability building
    • Built scalable reporting systems supporting 350+ users globally with focus on performance, security, and maintainability
    • Evaluated and optimized technology architectures for scalability, reliability, and operational excellence

Co-Founder / CEO & Technical Director
Urban Evolution	Apr 2010 – Apr 2020
    • Served as CEO, CTO, and CIO for multi-location franchise operation, owning business strategy, technology infrastructure, and operational systems
    • Designed and implemented enterprise technology architecture supporting business operations across multiple locations
    • Led all technology investments, digital transformation initiatives, and infrastructure scaling to support rapid business growth
    • Built and managed cross-functional teams across business and technical domains
    • Developed comprehensive reporting and analytics systems supporting executive decision-making and operational efficiency

VitalSpring Technologies
BI Senior Manager	May 2008 – Jul 2016
    • Served as Product Manager for enterprise BI/analytics initiatives, driving technology strategy and business alignment
    • Led Agile delivery methodologies and cross-functional team collaboration to deliver scalable analytics platforms
    • Designed performance monitoring and optimization systems identifying operational bottlenecks, generating $70K+ in cost savings
    • Mentored technical teams and established best practices for enterprise data architecture and reporting systems

EARLIER EXPERIENCE

Senior BI Consultant – Claraview (Teradata), 2006–2008
    • Technical architect for 25,000-user enterprise reporting platform (Lowe's); defined enterprise KPIs and analytics frameworks for Fortune 100 client

BI Consultant – Kinetic Networks, 2005–2006
    • Delivered enterprise analytics solutions for Google, Yahoo, Wells Fargo

IT Specialist – U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, 2002–2005
    • Led IT strategy development for National Center for Environmental Economics; managed team of 6 developers and engineers; maintained Public Trust clearance

Operations Manager – MicroStrategy, 1999–2001
    • Led engineering team; delivered integrated analytics systems; saved ~$312K/year through strategic vendor optimization

SELECTED SYSTEMS & INNOVATION
    • Designed secure on-premises LLM/RAG platform for knowledge management with role-based access controls and comprehensive audit logging
    • Built enterprise containerized environments for data services and application deployment across distributed infrastructure
    • Implemented integrated systems combining data pipelines, event-driven automation, and comprehensive monitoring frameworks
    • Operate advanced technology laboratory (10GbE backbone, 100TB+ storage, Docker-based services, enterprise routing) for continuous learning and innovation

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Enterprise Architecture: ERP systems (Workday, iFAMS), enterprise data architecture, system integration
Cloud & Infrastructure: Azure (data services), Linux (Ubuntu), Docker, distributed systems, CI/CD practices
Data & Analytics: SQL, Python, ETL/ELT, data modeling, enterprise data pipelines
BI Platforms: Tableau, Power BI, MicroStrategy
Cybersecurity: Network security architecture, data integrity frameworks, risk assessment methodologies
AI/ML Strategy: RAG pipelines, embeddings, vector search, local model deployment, enterprise AI strategy
Microsoft Environments: Windows Server, Active Directory, Microsoft 365, SQL Server, SharePoint

CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION
B.A., Washington University in St. Louis
CISSP (Certified Information Systems Security Professional)  ·  Certified Scrum Master  ·  Tableau Certified Professional  ·  MicroStrategy Certified Developer  ·  Network Security Certified Professional (NSCP)
